hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs)$' && bunx eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(bun\.lock|wrangler\.toml|\.env)$'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Fichier protege - bun.lock, wrangler.toml et .env ne peuvent pas etre modifies"}}'; fi; }
